categories.name: Traditional & BBQ
categories.tagline: Karahi, tikka, and naan straight off the coals.

items.name: Chicken Karahi
items.description: The house karahi — tomato, green chili, ginger, full-flavored.

items.name: Bayroute Special Chicken Karahi
items.description: Our own blend, richer and spiced further than the classic — straight off the coals, still at a full boil.

items.name: Beef Seekh Kabab
items.description: Hand-shaped, char-grilled, served hot off the skewer.

categories.name: Continental
categories.tagline: Steaks, pastas, and a proper Caesar.

items.name: Grilled Beef Steak
items.description: Choice of mushroom, tarragon, black pepper, or Moroccan sauce — seared hard, rested, still audibly sizzling on the plate.

items.name: Chicken Florentine
items.description: Pan-seared chicken, a lighter continental plate.

items.name: Grilled Chicken Caesar Salad
items.description: Grilled chicken, crisp romaine, house dressing.

categories.name: Chinese
categories.tagline: Wok-fired — a different stop on the same route.

items.name: Chicken Manchurian
items.description: Deep-fried chicken tossed in a sweet-savory sauce, straight out of a screaming-hot wok.

items.name: Kung Pao Chicken
items.description: Peanuts, chili, a proper wok char.

items.name: Chicken Chow Mein
items.description: Stir-fried noodles, wok heat, simple and fast.

categories.name: Burgers & Sandwiches
categories.tagline: For the table that wants something familiar.

items.name: Club House Sandwich
items.description: Triple-decker, choice of brown, white, or focaccia.

categories.name: Desserts
categories.tagline: A slow finish to a long table.

items.name: Shahi Tukra
items.description: Fried bread, condensed milk, a classic done properly — served cold, no rush to finish it.

items.name: Laziza Kheer
items.description: Slow-cooked rice pudding, cardamom, and nuts.

platters.name: Family Feast
platters.description: Half chicken handi, yakhni pullo, malai boti, chicken seekh kabab, naan, roti, grilled vegetables, assorted chutneys, 1.5L drink.

platters.name: Desi Duo Delight
platters.description: Yakhni pullo, malai boti, tikka boti, chicken seekh kabab, naan, roti, assorted chutneys, two mocktails.

platters.name: Chinese Platter
platters.description: Two Chinese mains, wings, chicken strips, two mocktails.
